Class AuditServiceImpl<T>

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.AuditServiceImpl<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the target object being audited in this service context
All Implemented Interfaces:
AuditService<T>
public class AuditServiceImpl<T> extends Object implements AuditService<T>
Concrete implementation of AuditService that both prints a formatted log line to the console and persists each entry to the underlying AuditRepository. The in-memory list preserves type information (the generic T) for the duration of a single command execution; the repository stores the target as its string description so the audit trail survives across invocations.

  • Constructor Details

    • AuditServiceImpl

      public AuditServiceImpl(Staff staff, AuditRepository auditRepository)
      Constructs a new AuditServiceImpl bound to the given staff member and repository. All entries logged through this instance will be attributed to staff and persisted via auditRepository.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member performing the audited operations; must not be null
      auditRepository - the repository used to persist audit entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if either argument is null

  • Method Details

    • log

      public void log(String action, T target)
      Records an audit entry for the given action and target object. The staff member is determined internally from the instance configured at construction time. Throws an exception if any argument is null. Prints a formatted log line to the console, adds the entry to the in-memory list, and persists it to the audit repository. The console format is: [INFO] yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss staffName → action | target.toString().
      Specified by:
      log in interface AuditService<T>
      Parameters:
      action - a short description of the action (e.g. "approved", "recorded vaccination")
      target - the object that was acted upon
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if action is null or blank, or target is null

    • getLog

      public List<AuditEntry<T>> getLog()
      Returns all audit log entries recorded so far. Returns an empty list if no entries have been logged. Returns entries accumulated during the current command execution only. Entries from previous executions are not included; use the repository's findAll() method to retrieve the full historical log.
      Specified by:
      getLog in interface AuditService<T>
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable view of the in-memory audit log for this session
